samples.xml_description:
<module id="synchronizer">
    <description>Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en signal is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in is constant during data_en high. The data_en signal is 1-cycle pulse generated by FSM and the data_in is input data of the FSM. The clk_a is FSM's clock and clk_b is clock of this synchronizer. The dataout is output of this synchronizer, which is connected to the FSM output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk_a">Input clock A.</input>
        <input id="clk_b">Input clock B.</input>
        <input id="arstn">Input reset A.</input>
        <input id="brstn">Input reset B.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[3:0]">Input data.</input>
        <input id="data_en">Input data enable.</input>
        <output id="dataout" width_description="[3:0]">Output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum_value id="one" value="0b01">State one.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="two" value="0b10">State two.</enum_value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="data_reg" width_description="[3:0]" type="sequential_logic">Data input register.</reg>
        <reg id="en_data_reg" width_description="[3:0]" type="sequential_logic">Data enable register.</reg>
        <reg id="en_clap_one" width_description="[3:0]" type="sequential_logic">Clap one enable register.</reg>
        <reg id="en_clap_two" width_description="[3:0]" type="sequential_logic">Clap two enable register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always_comb>
            <case>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>data_reg</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs>4'b0000</rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <not>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </not>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>data_reg</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs><signal>data_in</signal></rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
            </case>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb>
            <case>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>en_data_reg</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs>1'b0</rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <not>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </not>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>en_data_reg</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs><signal>data_en</signal></rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
            </case>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb>
            <case>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>en_clap_one</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs>1'b0</rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <not>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </not>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>en_clap_one</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs><signal>en_data_reg</signal></rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
            </case>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb>
            <case>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>en_clap_two</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs>1'b0</rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <not>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </not>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>en_clap_two</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs><signal>en_clap_one</signal></rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
            </case>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb>
            <case>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>dataout</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs>4'b0000</rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <not>
                            <term><signal>reset</signal></term>
                        </not>
                    </condition>
                    <result>
                        <assign>
                            <lhs><signal>dataout</signal></lhs>
                            <rhs>
                                <cond_expr>
                                    <condition><signal>en_clap_two</signal></condition>
                                    <true_expr><signal>data_reg</signal></true_expr>
                                    <false_expr><signal>dataout</signal></false_expr>
                                </cond_expr>
                            </rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </result>
                </case_item>
            </case>
        </always_comb>
    </implementation>
</module>
